player_notes.jalen williams: Williams declared himself healthy entering the WCF after missing six games with a Grade 1 left hamstring strain. Full return to rotation expected; props should reflect normal usage.
player_notes.og anunoby: Practiced again Saturday; described right hamstring injury as less severe than 2024 version. Monitor availability/minutes restriction for Knicks-Cavaliers ECF opener.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: Jalen Williams returns healthy after 6-game absence — boosts his prop floors and may affect minutes distribution for Thunder bench wings.
game_notes.NYK vs CLE: Anunoby practicing but hamstring injury is a live concern; potential minutes restriction or late scratch risk for Knicks.

This confirms Anunoby has a documented right hamstring injury heading into the ECF.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add OG Anunoby to the active injury concerns section with a right hamstring injury designation. Note he practiced Saturday (May 16) and described it as less severe than his 2024 hamstring injury. Flag as a monitor item for ECF Game 1 availability and potential minutes restriction. This is a meaningful prop risk factor for any Anunoby picks in the ECF.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: No mention of SGA winning a second consecutive MVP award in the season context document.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms SGA has won his second consecutive NBA MVP award, becoming the 14th player in league history to win back-to-back MVPs. The finalists were SGA, Jokic, and Wembanyama.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update SGA player note to reflect he has won back-to-back MVP awards (2024-25 and 2025-26). This is contextual/biographical and does not affect prop modeling directly, but is relevant background for the WCF context.
